scenarios.name: Still Subject
scenarios.description: Subject remains as still as possible under stable lighting.

scenarios.name: Head Motion
scenarios.description: Subject performs left-right and up-down head movements.

scenarios.name: Lighting Variation
scenarios.description: Ambient light intensity changes while subject stays in frame.

scenarios.name: Distance Variation
scenarios.description: Subject changes distance from camera while keeping face visible.

notes: Manual implementations only: Green, CHROM, POS, and SSR/2SR-style.
